steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The closing sentence begins with “Torchy Brown thus shows how”—the word thus is the key signal. It indicates a conclusion: the passage has been demonstrating how Ormes presented Black American experiences through her work.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The passage gives Torchy Brown as an example to show how Ormes presented Black American experiences—depicting a journey reflecting the Great Migration while explicitly demonstrating her method of using comics to address such issues.

The other choices either assert unsupported facts (A and D) or misread the passage (B claims changed subjects when the text shows only continuation).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
